failure.message: Ensure API GatewayV2 routes specify an authorization type

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_apigatewayv2_route.default File: /api-gateway/main.tf: 56-60 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-iam-policies/bc-aws-309
56 | resource "aws_apigatewayv2_route" "default" { 57 | api_id = aws_apigatewayv2_api.main.id 58 | route_key = "ANY /{proxy+}" 59 | target = "integrations/${aws_apigatewayv2_integration.alb.id}" 60 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

failure.message: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api_gw File: /api-gateway/main.tf: 75-78 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-that-cloudwatch-log-group-is-encrypted-by-kms
75 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "api_gw" { 76 | name = "/aws/apigateway/${local.name_prefix}" 77 | retention_in_days = 7 78 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_336] Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems

failure.message: Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_ecs_task_definition.api File: /ecs-fargate/main.tf: 65-94 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-336
65 | resource "aws_ecs_task_definition" "api" { 66 | family = "${local.name_prefix}-api" 67 | network_mode = "awsvpc" 68 | requires_compatibilities = ["FARGATE"] 69 | cpu = var.api_cpu 70 | memory = var.api_memory 71 | execution_role_arn = aws_iam_role.ecs_execution.arn 72 | 73 | container_definitions = jsonencode([{ 74 | name = "api" 75 | image = var.api_image_uri 76 | essential = true 77 | portMappings = [{ 78 | containerPort = 3000 79 | protocol = "tcp" 80 | }] 81 | logConfiguration = { 82 | logDriver = "awslogs" 83 | options = { 84 | "awslogs-group" = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.api.name 85 | "awslogs-region" = var.aws_region 86 | "awslogs-stream-prefix" = "api" 87 | } 88 | } 89 | environment = [ 90 | { name = "NODE_ENV", value = var.environment }, 91 | { name = "PORT", value = "3000" } 92 | ] 93 | }]) 94 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_336] Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems

failure.message: Ensure ECS containers are limited to read-only access to root filesystems

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_ecs_task_definition.web File: /ecs-fargate/main.tf: 96-125 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-336
96 | resource "aws_ecs_task_definition" "web" { 97 | family = "${local.name_prefix}-web" 98 | network_mode = "awsvpc" 99 | requires_compatibilities = ["FARGATE"] 100 | cpu = var.web_cpu 101 | memory = var.web_memory 102 | execution_role_arn = aws_iam_role.ecs_execution.arn 103 | 104 | container_definitions = jsonencode([{ 105 | name = "web" 106 | image = var.web_image_uri 107 | essential = true 108 | portMappings = [{ 109 | containerPort = 3001 110 | protocol = "tcp" 111 | }] 112 | logConfiguration = { 113 | logDriver = "awslogs" 114 | options = { 115 | "awslogs-group" = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.web.name 116 | "awslogs-region" = var.aws_region 117 | "awslogs-stream-prefix" = "web" 118 | } 119 | } 120 | environment = [ 121 | { name = "NODE_ENV", value = var.environment }, 122 | { name = "PORT", value = "3001" } 123 | ] 124 | }]) 125 | }

failure.message: Ensure all data stored in the SNS topic is encrypted

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_260] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80

failure.message: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_security_group.alb File: /security/main.tf: 126-159 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-aws-security-groups-do-not-allow-ingress-from-00000-to-port-80
126 | resource "aws_security_group" "alb" { 127 | #checkov:skip=CKV2_AWS_5:SG adjunto al ALB definido en el modulo alb 128 | name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-alb" 129 | description = "SG del Application Load Balancer — permite HTTPS desde internet" 130 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 131 | 132 | ingress { 133 | description = "HTTPS desde internet" 134 | from_port = 443 135 | to_port = 443 136 | protocol = "tcp" 137 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 138 | } 139 | 140 | ingress { 141 | description = "HTTP desde internet (redirect a HTTPS)" 142 | from_port = 80 143 | to_port = 80 144 | protocol = "tcp" 145 | cidr_blocks = ["0.0.0.0/0"] 146 | } 147 | 148 | egress { 149 | description = "Hacia microservicios en subredes de app" 150 | from_port = 0 151 | to_port = 0 152 | protocol = "-1" 153 | cidr_blocks = [var.vpc_cidr] 154 | } 155 | 156 | tags = { 157 | Name = "${local.name_prefix}-sg-alb" 158 | } 159 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

failure.message: Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

skipped.message: SG adjunto al ALB definido en el modulo alb

skipped.message: SG adjunto a las ECS tasks definidas en el modulo ecs

skipped.message: SG adjunto al cluster Aurora definido en el modulo rds

skipped.message: SG adjunto al cluster Redis definido en el modulo elasticache
